steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0015_literature_survey_cable_theory worktree and branch from main.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify no blocking dependencies (task has empty dependency list).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure for 25 paper assets and 1 answer asset.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review t0002 DSGC corpus for existing cable-theory coverage and identify gaps.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search the internet for ~25 cable-theory papers across five themes (Rall foundations, d_lambda rule, branched-tree impedance, frequency-domain, thin-dendrite transmission).

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior task code/libraries for cable-theory assumptions to align answer synthesis with project implementation context.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan.md covering paper selection, /add-paper invocations, paywall policy, and answer-asset design.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: literature survey is local-only, no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download ~25 cable-theory papers via /add-paper subagents; record paywalled DOIs; create one synthesis answer asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical literature survey does not require out-of-the-box analysis.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json (empty), costs.json (0), remote_machines_used.json ([]).

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: survey produces no quantitative performance metrics to compare.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up task suggestions (e.g., remaining category surveys, paywalled-paper retrieval).

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalize task.json with status=completed and end_time.
